name: shesha-developer
description: Skills for building applications on the latest Shesha framework. Scaffolds domain entities, database migrations, application services, DTOs, configuration items, fluent validators, domain events, notifications, SMS gateways, specifications, settings, forms, custom components, custom pages, and module projects following Shesha/.NET/ABP and NHibernate conventions. Includes the design pipeline: shesha-claude-designer (orchestrator), shesha-design-comprehension (measured layout blueprints + placement verification), shesha-design-system (theming), shesha-form-edit (structure, with a source-derived component KB, 0.43 version-lifecycle support, a mandatory retrieval router, golden production-form archetypes, and a styled-ness gate), and shesha-custom-page-designer (stripped variant for bespoke custom pages). v2.0: mechanical enforcement via plugin hooks — validate-on-write (guardrails + styled-ness on any written form markup) and a Stop-time persistence gate driven by a push ledger (a session cannot end with authored-but-unpushed forms).
